_comment: Autopod container seccomp profile. defaultAction ALLOW keeps compatibility with Docker's built-in default while explicitly blocking namespace/mount syscalls that are most useful for container escapes. Combined with CapDrop=ALL this significantly reduces the attack surface.

syscalls._comment: Block AF_ALG (38) socket creation. Mitigates CVE-2026-31431 (Copy Fail) and the broader algif_* attack surface. AF_ALG is the userspace front-door to the kernel crypto API; nothing autopod containers run uses it (OpenSSL/GnuTLS/SSH/kTLS all bypass AF_ALG).
